report.summary: Created 5 missing OG images (SVG+PNG), fixed 3 mismatched OG metadata URLs, and improved UX across OptionsPnLCalculator, DALayerComparison, and PredictionMarketCalculator components.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: OptionsPnLCalculator: Made SVG chart fully responsive (removed fixed maxWidth, added height:auto) for proper mobile rendering
OptionsPnLCalculator: Increased chart height from 220px to 260px for better readability on mobile
OptionsPnLCalculator: Reduced input grid minmax from 160px to 140px so 4 inputs fit better on tablet viewports
DALayerComparison: Increased sort button touch targets (padding 4px→6px, font 11px→12px, added 32px minHeight) for mobile accessibility
PredictionMarketCalculator: Added aria-label, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, aria-valuenow to range slider for screen reader support
PredictionMarketCalculator: Enlarged slider thumb from 16px to 22px for better mobile touch targets

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: restaking-avs-ecosystem-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG+PNG) — purple/indigo theme with restaking flow diagram and stat cards
OG image: intent-based-dex-trading-guide (1200x630 SVG+PNG) — cyan/green theme with intent architecture flow
OG image: based-rollups-preconfirmations-guide (1200x630 SVG+PNG) — orange/red theme with preconfirmation flow diagram
OG image: data-availability-layer-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG+PNG) — green/cyan theme with throughput comparison bars
OG image: chain-abstraction-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG+PNG) — pink/purple theme with chain abstraction flow

sections.title: Metadata Fixes
items: Fixed based-rollups page: OG URL changed from og-based-rollups-guide.png → og-based-rollups-preconfirmations-guide.png
Fixed data-availability page: OG URL changed from og-data-availability-guide.png → og-data-availability-layer-guide-2026.png
Fixed chain-abstraction page: OG URL changed from og-chain-abstraction-guide.png → og-chain-abstraction-guide-2026.png
